short_description: The world's first complete and fully integrated travel system, allowing you to move from car seat to stroller in seconds.
climate_notes: Fabrics are breathable and removable for washing. Safe for high temperatures in UAE, but do not leave exposed in a parked car for long periods without AC to avoid burning buckles.
safety_notes: Never place in a front passenger seat with an active airbag. Always install rear-facing.
manual_snippets: To unfold, press the red safety button on the back while pulling the handle upwards until you hear a click.
The handle must rest against the vehicle seat back when used in the car to act as an anti-rebound bar.
For airplane use, place Doona on the window seat and route the lap belt through the blue guides.

short_description: Engineered for maximum safety and comfort, featuring a zip-off machine washable seat pad.
climate_notes: Zip-off pad is great for regular washing during sweaty summer months.
safety_notes: Keep rear-facing until child is at least 18kg for maximum safety.
manual_snippets: Use the SuperCinch LATCH tightener to secure the seat tightly to your vehicle.
Adjust the ReclineSure 9-position leveling system to fit the angle of your vehicle seat.
Do not use abrasive cleaners on the harness straps.
customer_reviews: Super sturdy and my 4 year old still fits comfortably.
The zip off fabric is a lifesaver for diaper blowouts.
A bit wide, so fitting 3 across in my SUV is tight.

short_description: The ultra-compact stroller that folds and unfolds in a moment, can be worn over the shoulder and tucks in anywhere.

technical_specs.materials: Aluminum alloy, stainless steel, glass-fiber reinforced plastics

climate_notes: Features an anti-UV (UPF 50+) water-repellent fabric canopy.
safety_notes: Always engage the parking brake when stopped.
manual_snippets: Fold the stroller by pressing the white buttons on the side, then pulling the red latch.
Approved as cabin luggage for most airlines, but always check with your carrier.
customer_reviews: I literally carry this onto Emirates flights with zero hassle.
Best purchase ever for mall walking.
Incredible steering with just one hand.

short_description: A high-back booster seat offering excellent side-impact protection and a quick, easy buckle system.
climate_notes: Breathable fabrics prevent overheating on long road trips.
safety_notes: Ensure the vehicle seatbelt passes through the red belt guides.
manual_snippets: Install using ISOFIX connectors for extra stability even when the child is not in the seat.
The headrest is adjustable to grow with your child.
AirProtect technology in the headrest reduces the risk of head injury by 20%.
customer_reviews: My 6-year-old loves how comfortable it is.
Very easy to switch between cars.

short_description: Advanced air design delivers maximum airflow for unparalleled deep sleeps. Pops open easily into a sturdy, safe play space.
climate_notes: All mesh sides and floor provide 360-degree ventilation, perfect for warm climates.
safety_notes: Stop using when child is able to climb out or reaches the height of 86 cm.
manual_snippets: Push down on the center hub to lock the crib open.
Pull the center strap upwards to fold the crib instantly.
The mattress cover is machine washable and dryer safe.
customer_reviews: So easy to fold, literally takes 3 seconds.
A bit heavy for air travel, but perfect for road trips.
